{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Daishou
| children = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Long]], [[Jai Chen]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Star Lance technique, Fall of Seven Stars technique, [[Ancestor's Spear]], [[Flowing Starlight]], [[Enforcer technique]], [[Forger technique]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[Path of the Stellar Spear]], [[Striker technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|seventh Underlord of the Blackflame Empire, Patriarch of the Jai clan, Truegold elder}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[Jai Underlord]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame Empire]], [[Jai clan]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Jai Daishou Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jai]] Daishou was the Patriarch and [[Underlord]] of the [[Jai clan]]. An elderly man with white hair composed of metal strands due to his [[Goldsign]], he was known throughout the [[Empire]] for a reputation of respect and honor. He was a master of spear arts, specifically utilizing the [[Ancestor’s Spear]] and a technique known as the [[Fall of Seven Stars]]. Throughout his long rule, he had many potential successors, though none were able to bridge the gap to his level of power. As he approached the end of his [[life]], [[Jai]] Daishou's physical condition declined significantly; his once straight posture became curved and his strength waned. Despite his failing health, he remained a powerful [[Underlord]] capable of conducting personal trials for clan members like [[Jai Long]]. He sought to use his remaining influence and resources, such as top-grade scales earned through service to the [[Empire]], to benefit his clan. His [[life]] concluded following a period of intense physical and emotional strain, resulting in a fatal heart attack.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|As the Patriarch of the [[Jai clan]], which holds the third rank among the three great clans, [[Jai]] Daishou places the highest value on propriety. He serves as an [[Underlord]] and is specifically recognized as the seventh [[Underlord]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. During a conflict involving Underlords, this [[Truegold]] elder utilized various methods including the [[Ancestor's Spear]] and the [[Star Lance]] technique. His combat repertoire also included the [[Fall of Seven Stars]], [[Flowing Starlight]], and both [[Enforcer]] and [[Forger techniques]]. Following these events, [[Renfei]] had planned to secure his testimony.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] values propriety as the highest virtue.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] is the seventh [[Underlord]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]] and the Patriarch of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] is the Patriarch of the third-ranked of the three great clans.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] was involved in a fight between Underlords.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] is the Patriarch of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] is a [[Truegold]] elder.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses the [[Star Lance]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses the [[Fall of Seven Stars]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses the [[Ancestor's Spear]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses [[Flowing Starlight]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses a [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] planned to take [[Jai Daishou]]’s testimony.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai Underlord]] [[Jai]] Daishou, distinguished by hair made of white metal strands, faced a terminal decline while possessing the [[Goldsign]] of the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]]. During his final struggles, his face flushed red and his lips became speckled with blood as he drew power from an [[Archstone]], eventually eroding his very soul's foundation. He utilized a [[Striker technique]] capable of blasting through stone and released a rush of unstable [[madra]] that caused [[Jai Chen]]'s core to swell. After retrieving the [[Archstone]] from a western labyrinth and opening an entrance to a [[labyrinth]] within his territory, [[Jai]] Daishou's death resulted in the manifestation of an [[Underlord's Remnant]]. His involvement ultimately altered the circumstances surrounding [[Jai Long]], though [[Lindon]] noted that [[Eithan]] could have ended his [[life]] instantly.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] has white metal strands for hair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] is dying.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] possesses the [[Goldsign]] of the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]]'s face turned red and his lips were speckled with blood.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] is a [[Jai Underlord]] whose spirit has been permanently damaged.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] used a [[Striker technique]] that blasted through stone.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]]'s death resulted in the manifestation of an [[Underlord's Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] drew power from the [[Archstone]] until his soul's foundation was eroded.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]]'s involvement changed the situation involving [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] believes [[Eithan]] could have finished [[Jai Daishou]] immediately.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] opened an entrance to the [[labyrinth]] in his territory.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] released a rush of unstable [[madra]] that swollen [[Jai Chen]]'s core.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] retrieved the [[Archstone]] from a western labyrinth.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Jai Daishou]] is dead.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Daishou]] once helped attack the city of Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Daishou]] ran [[Jai Long]] through personal trials.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Jai Daishou]] used a [[Divine Treasure]] to fake his death.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“You could have finished off Jai Daishou immediately.”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Jai clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
